merchant_info.name: Koinworks
merchant_info.business_type: P2P Lending Platform - Super App for Funding

parameter_a.notes: Legal entity PT Lunaria Annua Teknologi. OJK licensed P2P lending platform. Well-established fintech.

parameter_b.notes: OJK Licensed P2P Lending: S-1862/NB.111/2017. NOT a PJP - receives payments for own lending products. OJK regulated, not BI.

parameter_c.notes: Clear P2P lending services: Pinjaman Bisnis, Pinjaman PNS, Invoice Financing. Super App for Funding.

parameter_d.notes: Transparent pricing for lending products. Clear fee structure on platform.

parameter_e.notes: Complete T&C documentation. OJK compliant lending platform.

parameter_f.notes: Multiple support channels. In-app chat, email, phone. Active customer service.

parameter_g.notes: PDP compliant. OJK regulated lending platform with data protection requirements.

parameter_h.notes: Secure platform. Bank-level security. OJK compliance requires security standards.

parameter_i.notes: Established fintech. 10K+ reviews on Play Store. Multiple funding rounds. Strong reputation.

general_notes: Koinworks is an OJK-licensed P2P lending platform (NOT a PJP/Aggregator). Classified as Regular Merchant since they receive payments for their own lending products.
